mapper.select:
SELECT p.prod_release_code, o.order_code, s.prod_code, o.due_date, c.prod_name, e.emp_name, cl.client_name, p.emp_code, p.release_quantity, p.release_date FROM prod_release p JOIN orders o ON p.order_code = o.order_code JOIN emp e ON p.emp_code = e.emp_code JOIN prod_store s ON p.lot = s.lot JOIN prod_common c ON s.prod_code = c.prod_code JOIN client cl ON o.client_code = cl.client_code
AND o.order_code LIKE '%'||#{orderCode}||'%'
AND c.prod_name LIKE '%'||#{prodName}||'%'
AND e.emp_name LIKE '%'||#{empName}||'%'
ORDER BY prod_release_code DESC

SELECT FIND_CLIENT_NAME (od.client_code) client_name, e.emp_name, c.prod_name, o.prod_code, r.emp_code, o.order_code, o.order_quantity, o.order_detail_code, NVL(SUM(r.release_quantity), 0) AS send, NVL(o.order_quantity, 0) - NVL(SUM(r.release_quantity), 0) AS no_send FROM (SELECT order_code, prod_code, order_detail_code, SUM(order_quantity) AS order_quantity FROM order_detail GROUP BY order_code, prod_code, order_detail_code) o LEFT JOIN orders od ON od.order_code = o.order_code LEFT JOIN prod_release r ON o.order_detail_code = r.order_detail_code LEFT JOIN prod_common c ON o.prod_code = c.prod_code LEFT JOIN emp e ON r.emp_code = e.emp_code WHERE o.order_code = #{orderCode} GROUP BY FIND_CLIENT_NAME (od.client_code), e.emp_name, c.prod_name, o.prod_code, r.emp_code, o.order_code, o.order_detail_code, o.order_quantity

SELECT cl.client_name, e.emp_name, c.prod_name, r.prod_release_code, r.order_detail_code, o.prod_code, r.emp_code, o.order_code, o.order_quantity, NVL(SUM(r.release_quantity), 0) AS send, NVL(SUM(o.order_quantity), 0) - NVL(SUM(r.release_quantity), 0) AS no_send FROM (SELECT order_code, prod_code, order_detail_code, SUM(order_quantity) AS order_quantity FROM order_detail GROUP BY order_code, prod_code, order_detail_code) o LEFT JOIN orders od ON od.order_code = o.order_code LEFT JOIN client cl ON cl.client_code = od.client_code LEFT JOIN prod_release r ON o.order_detail_code = r.order_detail_code LEFT JOIN prod_common c ON o.prod_code = c.prod_code LEFT JOIN emp e ON r.emp_code = e.emp_code WHERE r.prod_release_code = #{prodReleaseCode} GROUP BY r.prod_release_code, cl.client_name, e.emp_name, c.prod_name, r.order_detail_code, o.prod_code, r.emp_code, o.order_code, o.order_quantity

SELECT s.lot, s.prod_code, c.prod_name, SUM(NVL(s.store_quantity, 0)) - NVL((SELECT SUM(NVL(r.release_quantity, 0)) FROM prod_release r WHERE r.lot = s.lot), 0) AS inventory FROM prod_store s LEFT JOIN prod_common c ON s.prod_code = c.prod_code WHERE s.prod_code = #{prodCode} GROUP BY s.lot, c.prod_name, s.prod_code HAVING SUM(NVL(s.store_quantity, 0)) - NVL((SELECT SUM(NVL(r.release_quantity, 0)) FROM prod_release r WHERE r.lot = s.lot), 0) > 0 ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(substr(s.lot,4))
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'PRELEASE'||(NVL(MAX(order_num),0) + 1) AS order_detail_code FROM ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(prod_release_code,9)) AS order_num FROM prod_release )
INSERT INTO prod_release(prod_release_code, order_code, order_detail_code, lot, release_quantity, release_date, emp_code) VALUES (#{prodReleaseCode}, #{orderCode}, #{orderDetailCode}, #{lot}, #{releaseQuantity}, sysdate, #{empCode})
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(o.order_quantity, 0) - NVL(SUM(r.release_quantity), 0) AS no_send FROM (SELECT order_code, prod_code, order_detail_code, SUM(order_quantity) AS order_quantity FROM order_detail GROUP BY order_code, prod_code, order_detail_code) o LEFT JOIN orders od ON od.order_code = o.order_code LEFT JOIN prod_release r ON o.order_detail_code = r.order_detail_code WHERE o.order_detail_code=#{orderDetailCode} GROUP BY o.order_quantity

SELECT r.order_code, FIND_ORDER_NAME(r.order_code) order_name, FIND_CLIENT_NAME(o.client_code) client_name, FIND_PROD_NAME(d.prod_code) prod_name, FIND_EMP_NAME(r.emp_code) emp_name, r.lot, r.release_quantity, o.registration_date, r.release_date FROM orders o JOIN prod_release r ON(o.order_code=r.order_code) JOIN order_detail d ON (d.order_detail_code=r.order_detail_code)
AND r.order_code LIKE '%'||#{orderCode}||'%'
AND FIND_ORDER_NAME(r.order_code) LIKE '%'||#{orderName}||'%'
AND FIND_PROD_NAME(d.prod_code) LIKE '%'||#{prodName}||'%'
AND FIND_CLIENT_NAME(o.client_code) LIKE '%'||#{clientName}||'%'
AND FIND_EMP_NAME(r.emp_code) LIKE '%'||#{empName}||'%'
AND r.lot LIKE '%'||#{lot}||'%'
AND o.registration_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{registrationDate1}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{registrationDate2}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND r.release_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{releaseDate1}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{releaseDate2}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY r.release_date DESC
